title: graphorkis lutea
intro: Graphorkis lutea is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and unique growth habit. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The medicinal properties of Graphorkis lutea have been reported to provide relief from pain and inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and fever. In herbal preparations, Graphorkis lutea is often used in decoctions or infusions, or combined with other plants to create tonics and remedies for various health issues.
